title: HTML Advanced Topics Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags and attributes for advanced graphics and interactive elements.

questions.question: What is 'Scalable Vector Graphics' (SVG)?
options: A bitmap format for high-resolution photographs.
An image format based on XML vectors that can be scaled without losing quality.
A script used to automate image downloads.
A CSS property for applying shadows to images.

questions.question: Which tag provides a 'bitmap' area that is drawn upon using JavaScript for games and real-time graphics?
options: <svg>
<canvas>
<artboard>
<draw>

questions.question: The <math> tag (MathML) is used primarily for what purpose?
options: To perform complex calculations in the browser.
To describe mathematical formulas semantically for display and accessibility.
To store numerical data in a database.
To automatically generate charts from data.

questions.question: Which two tags are used to create a native accordion (expandable/collapsible) section without any JavaScript?
options: <div> and <span>
<details> and <summary>
<expand> and <collapse>
<header> and <section>

questions.question: When should you prefer SVG over Canvas for web graphics?
options: For complex, high-performance games with hundreds of moving objects.
For resolution-independent icons, logos, and simple illustrations.
Only when you don't use CSS.
Only for mobile devices.
